creator: david_hansen@ibm.net
text:
After the initial installation device configuration, the machine 
freezes.  This is after one of the very initial menus during 
beginning installation.  The visual device editor as well as the command
line based one both fail.  The visual one fails after the exit/save
and the command line one fails after the exit.  I would assume these
are exactly equal points as far as the machine is concerned.  After
trying to save the floppy drive is accessed once and the HD is accessed
on additional time as well.  The machine is not just busy, time will not
fix the problem.  The machine is an IBM Aptiva S64 with 48MB RAM and a 
real Intel NON-MMX P166.
